_comment: Fallback pricing only. Authoritative cost source is the CLI's total_cost_usd field. This table is used when tokens.json lacks total_cost_usd (legacy data) or when an unknown model is encountered.

codex._comment: Codex CLI pricing (OpenAI API rates). metering field: 'per_token' = charged per token via API; 'per_message' = flat rate per invocation (e.g. ChatGPT subscription). Probe task BUG-0115 confirmed: model is 'gpt-5.3-codex' from ~/.codex/config.toml; model identifier absent from JSONL stream. Source: https://openrouter.ai/openai/gpt-5.3-codex (2026-05-20). Cache fields: only cached_input_tokens present (no cache_creation_input_tokens per BUG-0114).

gpt-5.3-codex._comment: Observed model on this host (BUG-0115). Rates: $1.75/$14.00 per 1M in/out. Cached reads ~90% off input rate. No cache_creation billing observed (BUG-0114). Source: https://openrouter.ai/openai/gpt-5.3-codex

gpt-5.5._comment: Placeholder — not observed in probe. Source: https://openai.com/api/pricing/
